name: Point2f
summary: Represents the two coordinates of a point in two-dimensional space, using Single-precision floating point numbers.

constructors.name: Point2f(Double, Double)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new two-dimensional point from two double-precision floating point numbers as coordinates. Coordinates will be internally converted to floating point numbers. This might cause precision loss.

constructors.name: Point2f(Single, Single)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new two-dimensional point from two components.

methods.name: CompareTo
methods.signature: public int CompareTo(Point2f other)
methods.summary: Compares this Point2f with another Point2f. Coordinates evaluation priority is first X, then Y.

params.name: other
params.doc: The other Point2f to use in comparison.

returns.doc: 0: if this is identical to other-1: if this.X < other.X-1: if this.X == other.X and this.Y < other.Y+1: otherwise.

methods.name: DistanceTo
methods.signature: public double DistanceTo(Point2f other)
methods.summary: Computes the distance between two points.

returns.doc: The length of the line between this and the other point; or 0 if any of the points is not valid.

methods.name: DistanceToSquared
methods.signature: public double DistanceToSquared(Point2f other)
methods.summary: Computes the squared distance between two points.

returns.doc: The squared length of the line between this and the other point; or 0 if any of the points is not valid.

methods.name: EpsilonEquals
methods.signature: public bool EpsilonEquals(Point2f other, float epsilon)
methods.summary: Check that all values in other are within epsilon of the values in this

returns.doc: [Missing <returns> documentation for "M:Rhino.Geometry.Point2f.EpsilonEquals(Rhino.Geometry.Point2f,System.Single)"]

methods.name: Equals(Object)
methods.signature: public override bool Equals(Object obj)
methods.summary: Determines whether the specified System.Object is a Point2f and has the same values as the present point.

returns.doc: true if obj is Point2f and has the same coordinates as this; otherwise false.

methods.name: Equals(Point2f)
methods.signature: public bool Equals(Point2f point)
methods.summary: Determines whether the specified Point2f has the same values as the present point.

returns.doc: true if point has the same coordinates as this; otherwise false.

methods.name: GetHashCode
methods.signature: public override int GetHashCode()
methods.summary: Computes a hash number that represents the current point.

returns.doc: A hash code that is not unique for each point.

methods.name: ToString()
methods.signature: public override string ToString()
methods.summary: Constructs the string representation for the current point.

returns.doc: The point representation in the form X,Y.

methods.name: ToString(String, IFormatProvider)
methods.signature: public string ToString(string format, IFormatProvider formatProvider)
methods.summary: Formats the value of the current instance using the specified format.

params.name: format
params.doc: The format to use. -or- A null reference (null in Visual Basic) to use the default format defined for the type of the IFormattable implementation.

params.name: formatProvider
params.doc: The provider to use to format the value. -or- A null reference (null in Visual Basic) to obtain the numeric format information from the current locale setting of the operating system.

returns.doc: The value of the current instance in the specified format.

methods.name: Addition
methods.signature: public static Vector2f operator +(Point2f a, Point2f b)
methods.summary: Sums two Point2fs.

returns.doc: An added Vector2f.

methods.name: Division
methods.signature: public static Point2f operator /(Point2f a, float b)
methods.summary: Divides a Point2f by a scalar.

returns.doc: A divided Point2f.

methods.name: Equality
methods.signature: public static bool operator ==(Point2f a, Point2f b)
methods.summary: Determines whether two Point2f have equal values.

returns.doc: true if the coordinates of the two points are exactly equal; otherwise false.

methods.name: Explicit(Point2d to Point2f)
methods.signature: public static explicit operator Point2f (Point2d point)
methods.summary: Converts a double-precision point in a single-precision point. Needs explicit casting to help retain precision.

returns.doc: The resulting point.

methods.name: GreaterThan
methods.signature: public static bool operator >(Point2f a, Point2f b)
methods.summary: Determines whether the first specified Point2f comes after (has superior sorting value than) the second point. Coordinates evaluation priority is first X, then Y.

returns.doc: true if a.X is larger than b.X, or a.X == b.X and a.Y is larger than b.Y; otherwise, false.

methods.name: GreaterThanOrEqual
methods.signature: public static bool operator >=(Point2f a, Point2f b)
methods.summary: Determines whether the first specified Point2f comes after (has superior sorting value than) the second point, or it is equal to it. Coordinates evaluation priority is first X, then Y.

returns.doc: true if a.X is larger than b.X, or a.X == b.X and a.Y >= b.Y; otherwise, false.

methods.name: Inequality
methods.signature: public static bool operator !=(Point2f a, Point2f b)
methods.summary: Determines whether two Point2f have different values.

returns.doc: true if the two points differ in any coordinate; false otherwise.

methods.name: LessThan
methods.signature: public static bool operator <(Point2f a, Point2f b)
methods.summary: Determines whether the first specified Point2f comes before (has inferior sorting value than) the second point. Coordinates evaluation priority is first X, then Y.

returns.doc: true if a.X is smaller than b.X, or a.X == b.X and a.Y is smaller than b.Y; otherwise, false.

methods.name: LessThanOrEqual
methods.signature: public static bool operator <=(Point2f a, Point2f b)
methods.summary: Determines whether the first specified Point2f comes before (has inferior sorting value than) the second point, or it is equal to it. Coordinates evaluation priority is first X, then Y.

returns.doc: true if a.X is smaller than b.X, or a.X == b.X and a.Y <= b.Y; otherwise, false.

methods.name: Multiply
methods.signature: public static Point2f operator *(Point2f a, float b)
methods.summary: Multiplies a Point2f by a scalar.

returns.doc: A multiplied Point2f.

methods.name: Subtraction
methods.signature: public static Vector2f operator -(Point2f a, Point2f b)
methods.summary: Subtracts two Point2fs.

returns.doc: A subtracted Vector2f.

properties.name: IsValid
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this point is considered valid.

properties.name: Item
properties.summary: Accesses the coordinates of this point.

properties.name: X
properties.summary: Gets or sets the X (first) component of the vector.

properties.name: Y
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Y (second) component of the vector.
